title: rubus accessivus
intro: Rubus accessivus, also known as the wild raspberry, is a species of raspberry plant native to Europe and North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and antifungal properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Rubus accessivus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus accessivus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
